mapper.insert: insert into login_logs_51 (emp_id, login_input, result_code, is_failure, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) values (#{empId}, #{loginInput}, #{resultCode}, #{isFailure}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, getdate())
mapper.select: select log_id, emp_id, login_input, result_code, is_failure, ip_address, user_agent, created_at from login_logs_51 where emp_id = #{empId} order by created_at desc
select log_id, emp_id, login_input, result_code, is_failure, ip_address, user_agent, created_at from login_logs_51 order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update login_logs_51 set is_failure = 'n' where emp_id = #{empId} and is_failure = 'y'
